candidates.why: Separate operating D&A row exists, but nothing indicates it is specifically tied to the selected COGS row 'Artist and production costs'; conservatively avoid assigning shared/unspecified D&A to COGS.
Separate operating D&A row exists, but it is not labelled as cost of sales / production depreciation and may cover broader operating functions; do not add to COGS absent clearer linkage.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Artist and production costs'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not specifically identified as COGS-related or nested under the COGS row. To avoid double counting or misallocating shared operating D&A, no COGS-specific D&A row is added.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating amortization line above operating profit and was explicitly excluded from the previously selected XSGA component rows, so it appears to sit outside those selected rows and should be added separately.

This is a separate operating depreciation line above operating profit and was explicitly excluded from the previously selected XSGA component rows, so it appears to sit outside those selected rows and should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: This is also a separate operating depreciation line above operating profit. Because the mixed summary row includes impairment, using the clean depreciation components avoids including impairment while still capturing operating D&A outside the selected XSGA rows.

variables.notes: R:c. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other external costs' and 'Personnel costs', and the prior notes explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. Separate D&A rows are shown at the same operating level, so they appear to be outside the selected XSGA rows and should be added separately. The broader row 'Depreciation and impairment of fixed assets' is not used because it mixes D&A with impairment. Manual review is recommended because the statement does not explicitly split operating D&A between COGS and SG&A.
